positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a crescent moon and scattered constellations forming a celestial map. The composition should feature clean, bold line art of astronomical elements (stars, nebulae, comets) contrasting sharply against a deep, midnight indigo background. Use negative space effectively to create a sense of depth and wonder. The style should be retro-modern, reminiscent of scientific diagrams or vintage apothecary labels, utilizing gold foil accents and crisp white lines. The primary focus is the central arrangement of the constellations, making it perfect for a clean, repeating pattern or a central emblem. High contrast, excellent print detail, vector illustration quality, symmetrical composition, centered, dramatic, cosmic energy.
